description: Style Note Welcome the summer with the utmost style in this funky T-shirt from fila. Perfect for casual days out, you can wear this T-shirt for everyday dressing with jeans, cargos or chinos depending on your mood. Crafted in fine quality cotton and designed with a regular Fit, this one is soft and comfy. Product Details Navy blue round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves, print on the chest and branding on the left sleeve Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash in cold water Do not tumble or bleach Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M Style NoteWelcome the summer with the utmost style in this funky T-shirt from Fila.
